title: [Hall of Patrons, Vestibule]
description: Cool marble floors and frescoed walls enclose this spacious entryway.  Candlelight flickers brightly from brass wall sconces, illuminating the area and seamless marble columns support a large archway to the north, opening into a large rotunda.  To the south, large gated doors stand open.
